title: qqqwwspoop
description:
Adds poop and fun related items to Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge.
Required on both client and server.
为minecraft 1.20.1forge添加了大便和有趣的相关道具
body:
为1.20.1forge版本的minecraft添加了大便和小便，同时增加了与之相关的武器和装备，是一个增加真实性同时又具有恶趣味的mod
Required on both client and server.
For Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge), this mod adds bowel movements and urination, along with related weapons and gear. It enhances realism while incorporating a quirky sense of humor.

This mod adds some interesting features to Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge. For example, players can defecate and urinate. By collecting and processing their excrement, players can craft powerful armor, weapons, and tools. The newly added armor can grant players buffs, enable flight, and even prevent death. The tools provided are also exceptionally powerful.
